nasb.text: Like valleys that stretch out, Like gardens beside the river, Like aloes planted by the Lord, Like cedars beside the waters.

esv.text: Like palm groves that stretch afar, like gardens beside a river, like aloes that the Lord has planted, like cedar trees beside the waters.

cnv.text: 像擴展的棕林， 如河邊的園子， 似耶和華栽種的沉香樹， 又像水旁的香柏樹。

ccb.text: 像连绵的山谷， 河畔的园子； 又如耶和华栽种的沉香， 水边的香柏树。
